problem.title: Managing rentals without a system is chaos.
problem.subtitle: Every month the same routine: chasing payments, hunting for contracts, putting together tax reports. There's a better way.

items.excel: Tracking payments in Excel or WhatsApp
items.contracts: Contracts scattered across email and drives
items.taxes: Scrambling on tax reports before the deadline

howItWorks.title: Set up in 5 minutes.

featurePayments.title: Never miss a rent payment again.
featurePayments.subtitle: Automatic payment generation, QR codes for tenants, and a reminder system that works for you.

auto.title: Automatic generation
auto.desc: On the 1st of every month the system creates a payment for every tenant.

qr.title: QR code in email
qr.desc: Tenants get a reminder with a QR code 5 days before the due date.

reminders.title: Smart reminder system
reminders.desc: If unpaid, the system sends reminders on day 7 and day 14 after the due date.

status.title: Overview at a glance
status.desc: Who paid, who hasn't, how much is left to collect — instantly.

featureTenants.title: Tenant online in 2 minutes.
featureTenants.subtitle: Invite a tenant by email. They activate their account and see their portal with leases and payments.

invite.title: One-click invitation
invite.desc: Token valid for 72 hours. The tenant activates their account themselves.

portal.title: Tenant portal
portal.desc: Tenants see payments, contracts, and your contact — no more emails.

docs.title: Document sharing
docs.desc: Leases, handover protocols — available immediately after upload.

comms.title: Everything documented
comms.desc: No lost messages. Communication and documents in one place.

featureEnergy.title: Catch anomalies before they get costly.
featureEnergy.subtitle: Log meter readings. The system tracks consumption and alerts you to every anomaly.

reading.title: Manual meter entry
reading.desc: Electricity, gas, water, heat — clearly organized per property.

import.title: Import from supplier portal
import.desc: Load a CSV export from your energy supplier in one click.

featureDocuments.title: Contracts safe, taxes stress-free.
featureDocuments.subtitle: All documentation in one place with expiry alerts. Tax export for your accountant in one click.

storage.title: Secure storage
storage.desc: Leases, protocols, insurance, invoices — categorized and accessible.

expiry.title: Expiry alerts
expiry.desc: 60, 30 and 14 days before a lease or insurance expires.

tax.title: Tax export
tax.desc: PDF for your accountant structured for tax returns. Export in one click.

categories.title: Document categories
categories.desc: Leases, protocols, insurance, invoices, correspondence, inspections.

dashboardPreview.title: Everything you need. In one place.
dashboardPreview.subtitle: A dashboard designed so you always know exactly where you stand — income, occupancy, payments, alerts.

b2bFeature.title: Managing properties for clients?
b2bFeature.subtitle: EstatIQ B2B is a platform for professional property managers. Multi-tenant architecture, roles and permissions, client portal.

multiTenant.title: Multi-tenant architecture
multiTenant.desc: Every client only sees their own properties. Data is strictly separated.

roles.title: Roles and permissions
roles.desc: Super-Admin, Manager, Accountant, Viewer — everyone sees what they should.

clientPortal.title: Client portal
clientPortal.desc: Property owners get a read-only overview. No more monthly PDFs.

reports.title: Reports and exports
reports.desc: Occupancy, income, and expense reports for every client.

1.text: I've finally stopped chasing tenants for payments. Reminders go out automatically and I see everything in one dashboard.
1.name: Thomas K.

2.text: The tax export saved me two days of work at year-end. Great app — I recommend it to anyone with more than one property.
2.name: Petra M.

3.text: We moved 120 units to EstatIQ. Clients love the portal — no more monthly Excel reports.
3.name: Jan R.

1.q: How quickly can I get started?
1.a: Sign-up takes 60 seconds. After logging in the onboarding wizard walks you through everything — you can have your first property and tenant online in 5 minutes.

2.q: Do I need a credit card right away?
2.a: No. The Free plan is completely free with no time limit. You only enter a credit card when upgrading to a paid plan.

3.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
3.a: Your data stays safe. You move to read-only mode — you can see everything but can't add new records. You can return any time.

4.q: How does the tenant invitation work?
4.a: You enter the tenant's name and email. The system sends an invitation with a one-time token valid for 72 hours. The tenant activates their own account.

5.a: Yes. Data is stored on European servers. Tenants can request an export or deletion of their data any time through the portal.

6.q: Does EstatIQ work for property management firms?
6.a: Yes, we have B2B plans from CZK 2,500/month for firms managing 50–400+ units. Contact us for a demo.
